title: Silky Tunisian Herb Stir-fry
description: A herbal and silky solo-dinner dish featuring dill without nuts, air-fried for a light texture and nut-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup chopped dill
ingredients.notes: fresh or dried, depending on availability and preference

instructions: In a bowl, mix chopped dill with salt and pepper.
Place bell peppers, zucchini, onion, and garlic in the bowl with the spice mixture. Toss well until evenly coated.
Lightly oil an air fryer basket with olive oil and place the vegetable mixture inside, spreading out for even cooking.
Air-fry in batches for about 15-20 minutes or until vegetables are tender but not mushy, shaking the basket halfway through.
Once done, transfer to a serving dish. Serve immediately.
